# Data Dictionary

## research.yaml

- **Path:** seldon/domain/research.yaml
- **Format:** YAML
- **Schema:** Domain config for research projects. Defines artifact_types (with property schemas), relationship_types (from/to type constraints), and state_machines (valid transitions per artifact type).
- **Provenance:** Hand-authored domain configuration. Evolves with AD decisions (AD-002, AD-013). Current version: 0.1 with 10 artifact types and full property schemas.
- **Row count:** ~170 lines
